uberclock_csrs

This module defines the software-visible CSR bank for the UberClock DSP block.

class uberclock_soc.uberclock_csrs.UberClockCSRBank(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)[source]

Bases: LiteXModule

PHASE_WIDTH = 26
MAG_WIDTH = 12
GAIN_WIDTH = 32
SAMPLE_WIDTH = 16
FINAL_SHIFT_WIDTH = 3
